category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a tiny portable SOCKS5 server; official GitHub README describes MicroSocks as a multithreaded, small, efficient SOCKS5 server.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses MicroSocks; source_facts.name is microsocks.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes overview, usage behavior, and command-line orientation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/rofl0r/microsocks; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a SOCKS5 server; official GitHub topics include lightweight, proxy, socks5, socks5-server, and socks5-proxy.
